title: Steviol glycoside esters
abstract: The present disclosure provides edible compositions comprising Formulas and compounds of steviol glycoside esters, or combinations thereof, which are suitable for use as sweeteners, for example, by incorporation into edible compositions. Also provided herein are methods of preparing steviol glycoside ester compounds.
claims:
Claims WHAT IS CLAIMED IS: 1. A compound according to a Formula selected from the group consisting of: (a) Formula II: Formula II wherein Rl to R20 represent hydroxyl, formate, acetate, propionate, butyrate, valerate, citrate, hydrogen tartrate, malate, hydrogen malonate, hydrogen oxalate, pyruvate and at least eighteen R groups are hydroxyl groups, (b) Formula III: Formula III wherein Rl to R17 represent hydroxyl, formate, acetate, propionate, butyrate, valerate, citrate, hydrogen tartrate, malate, hydrogen malonate, hydrogen oxalate, pyruvate; and at least fifteen R groups are hydroxyl groups, (c) Formula IV: Formula IV wherein Rl to R14 represent hydroxyl, formate, acetate, propionate, butyrate, valerate, citrate, hydrogen tartrate, malate, hydrogen malonate, hydrogen oxalate, pyruvate; and at least twelve R groups are hydroxyl groups, and (d) Formula V: Formula V wherein Rl to Rl 1 represent hydroxyl, formate, acetate, propionate, butyrate, valerate, citrate, hydrogen tartrate, malate, hydrogen malonate, hydrogen oxalate, pyruvate; and at least nine R groups are hydroxyl groups. 2. The compound according to claim 1, wherein said compound is selected from: carboxylate carboxylate Compound 9 (2S,3R,4S,5S,6R)-6-(acetoxymethyl)-3,4,5- trihydroxytetrahydro-2H-pyran-2-yl (4R,4aS,6aR,9S, 11 aR, 1 lbS)-9- (((2S,3R,4S,5S,6R)-3-(((2S,3R,4S,5S,6R)-6- (acetoxymethyl)-3,4,5-trihydroxytetrahydro- 2H-pyran-2-yl)oxy)-4,5-dihydroxy-6- (hydroxymethyl)tetrahydro-2H-pyran-2- yl)oxy)-4, 1 lb-dimethyl-8- methylenetetradecahydro-6a,9- methanocyclohepta[a]naphthalene-4- carboxylate and a combination of the foregoing compounds. 3. The compound of claim 1 wherein the compound is isolated and purified. 4. The compound of claim 2, wherein the compound is isolated and purified. The sweetener of claim 13, further comprising at least one component selected from the group consisting of a filler, bulking agent, and an anticaking agent. 15. A method for preparing a compound according to claim 1 comprising mixing an aqueous solution comprising at least one steviol glycoside with at least one organic acid and heating the solution to a temperature within a range of 30Â°C to 90Â°C for a period of time greater than one day. 16. The method of claim 15, wherein the steviol glycoside is selected form the group consisting of a stevioside, RebA, RebM, and RebD. 17. The method of claim 16, wherein the organic acid as selected from the group consisting of formic acid, acetic acid, propionic acid, butyric acid, valeric acid, tartaric acid, malic acid, malonic acid, oxalic acid or pyruvic acid. 18. The method of claim 15, further comprising a step of isolating and purifying the said compound. 19. A compound prepared by the method of claim 15. 20. The compound of claim 1, wherein the compound provides a sweetness of at least 2-fold in a test sample compared to a control sample comprising a sweetener, but not comprising said compound and wherein the concentration of said compound in a test sample is the same as the concentration of the sweetener in the control sample.
